FunTarget (Windows)

1) Create a file named `config.json` in this folder (same folder as the .exe).
   You can copy `config.json.example` and fill in your values.

2) Run the .exe.

If the app says "Missing required configuration", it could not find:
  - SUPABASE_URL
  - SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
  - API_BASE_URL

The app loads these in this order:
  A) Windows environment variables
  B) config.json next to the exe
  C) (dev only) --dart-define at build/run time
